## Automated Test Requirements

All must-have and should-have stories satisfied via `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln` (801/801) and story-specific filters documented in `production/agentic/stacks/sprint28/S28-*-DONE.md`.

**Hard gates (verified @ closeout):**

```bash
export PATH="/home/username01/.dotnet:$PATH"
dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal
dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests \
  --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests" -v minimal
git diff HEAD -- src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter/Bridge/DelegationBridge.cs
```
